name: Zeus — Apple-native Search & Connections
description: Multi-modal Apple ecosystem-native search & connections. Substitui Omnisearch + Smart Connections com camadas afm (Foundation Models), av (Vision: classify+OCR+landmarks+EXIF), anl (NLContextualEmbedding 512-dim), aia (Intelligence: enrich+agent+graph) e HyDE query expansion. Indexação no Mac via afm CLI, leitura cross-device via iCloud.
author: Roger Maiocchi
